display.purpose: Hero headline only; Archivo stretched to 'wdth' 118. The brass em inside it is the page's one color-emphasis moment.

label.purpose: Mono: table headers, terminal title bars, fine print.

code.purpose: Mono: code samples and real terminal output; ligatures disabled.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: The only easing curve. State transitions (color, background, border) at 160ms.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Hover/focus recoloring. Nothing lifts, scales, or casts (The Flat Field Rule).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The brass action: one per view, Ink Dark text, recolors on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 2.9rem; padding: 0.6rem 1.4rem; border-radius: 4px; background: var(--brass, oklch(0.8 0.128 80)); color: var(--ink-dark, oklch(0.18 0.03 240)); font-family: 'Archivo Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 620; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--brass-bright, oklch(0.86 0.11 85)); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--brass, oklch(0.8 0.128 80)); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Hairline-bordered secondary action; border and text shift toward brass on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 2.9rem; padding: 0.6rem 1.4rem; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid var(--line, oklch(0.34 0.03 230)); background: transparent; color: var(--ink, oklch(0.94 0.012 230)); font-family: 'Archivo Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 620; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; transition: color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--brass, oklch(0.8 0.128 80)); color: var(--brass-bright, oklch(0.86 0.11 85)); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--brass, oklch(0.8 0.128 80)); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Copy Command Row
components.description: Signature: $-prompted install command with attached Copy button; button reads 'Copied' in brass after use.
components.html: $brew install tylerbutler/tap/trellis
components.css: .ds-cmdline { display: flex; align-items: stretch; background: var(--surface, oklch(0.205 0.026 230)); border: 1px solid var(--line, oklch(0.34 0.03 230)); border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; max-width: 34rem; } .ds-cmdline code { flex: 1; padding: 0.7rem 1rem; font-family: 'Martian Mono Variable', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--ink, oklch(0.94 0.012 230)); white-space: nowrap; overflow-x: auto; align-content: center; } .ds-prompt { color: var(--brass, oklch(0.8 0.128 80)); margin-right: 0.75ch; } .ds-copy-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border: none; border-left: 1px solid var(--line-soft, oklch(0.27 0.028 230)); background: var(--surface-2, oklch(0.25 0.03 230)); color: var(--ink-soft, oklch(0.88 0.02 230)); font-family: 'Archivo Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 560; padding: 0 1rem; min-width: 44px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-copy-btn:hover { color: var(--brass-bright, oklch(0.86 0.11 85)); background: var(--cobalt-deep, oklch(0.33 0.06 230)); }

components.name: Terminal Figure
components.description: Signature: real CLI output with mono title bar; semantic minimal coloring (names 560, structure gray, success brass).
components.css: .ds-term { margin: 0; background: var(--surface, oklch(0.205 0.026 230)); border: 1px solid var(--line, oklch(0.34 0.03 230)); border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; max-width: 30rem; } .ds-term-bar { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.5ch; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line-soft, oklch(0.27 0.028 230)); font-family: 'Martian Mono Variable', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: var(--ink-soft, oklch(0.88 0.02 230)); background: var(--surface-2, oklch(0.25 0.03 230)); } .ds-term .ds-prompt { color: var(--brass, oklch(0.8 0.128 80)); font-weight: 600; } .ds-term-out { margin: 0; padding: 1rem 1rem 1.5rem; overflow-x: auto; font-family: 'Martian Mono Variable', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--ink, oklch(0.94 0.012 230)); } .ds-name { font-weight: 560; } .ds-dim { color: var(--muted, oklch(0.76 0.022 230)); } .ds-ok { color: var(--brass, oklch(0.8 0.128 80)); font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Header navigation: Ink Soft at 520, brass on hover, no underline.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 2rem; } .ds-nav a { color: var(--ink-soft, oklch(0.88 0.02 230)); text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Archivo Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 520; padding: 0.5rem 0.25rem; transition: color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav a:hover { color: var(--brass-bright, oklch(0.86 0.11 85)); }

components.name: Docs Sidebar Item
components.description: Active page gets Surface-2 fill + brass text; unbuilt pages are non-link gray with a 'soon' pill.
components.css: .ds-docs-nav { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; display: grid; gap: 0.25rem; width: 15rem; font-family: 'Archivo Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; } .ds-docs-nav a, .ds-docs-nav .ds-soon { display: block; padding: 0.45rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-docs-nav a { color: var(--ink-soft, oklch(0.88 0.02 230)); } .ds-docs-nav a[aria-current="page"] { background: var(--surface-2, oklch(0.25 0.03 230)); color: var(--brass, oklch(0.8 0.128 80)); font-weight: 560; } .ds-docs-nav a:hover { color: var(--brass-bright, oklch(0.86 0.11 85)); background: var(--surface, oklch(0.205 0.026 230)); } .ds-soon { color: var(--muted, oklch(0.76 0.022 230)); } .ds-soon small { font-family: 'Martian Mono Variable', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; border: 1px solid var(--line, oklch(0.34 0.03 230)); border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.05rem 0.5rem; margin-left: 0.5ch; vertical-align: middle; }

narrative.overview: Trellis is a tool you trust the way you trust a well-made instrument: it derives its answers instead of asking you to declare them, and it verifies everything it cannot derive. The site carries the same character — brass dials on oxidized steel. The page surface is a deep harbor-steel blue, structural panels step up through tonal cobalt layers, and a single warm brass voice marks what matters. Typography pairs Archivo (stretched wide for display) with Martian Mono, which has a register reason: the product IS a CLI, and its real, unretouched output is the site's primary imagery.
keyCharacteristics: Committed color: steel cobalt carries the surface; brass is the single accent voice
Real terminal output as imagery — never fabricated, never prettified
Documentation styled with landing-page care; docs ARE the conversion surface
Flat, machined, exact: depth from tonal steps and 1px edges, never shadows or glow

rules.name: The Committed Surface Rule
rules.body: Steel cobalt is not an accent — the surface IS the brand. Hedging back to a white page with a blue button produces exactly the sterile default docs theme this brand rejects.

rules.name: The No-Glow Rule
rules.body: No gradient glows, no neon edges, no luminous blur behind UI. Emphasis comes from brass, weight, and exact alignment — never from light effects.

rules.name: The Ink-on-Cobalt Rule
rules.body: Fog Gray fails contrast on cobalt fills (3.4:1). On any cobalt surface, text is Chart Ink or Ink Soft — never muted gray.

rules.name: The Proof-in-Mono Rule
rules.body: Terminal output shown on the site is real trellis output, set in the mono, unretouched. Never fabricate or prettify command output.

rules.name: The Two-Voices Rule
rules.body: Archivo carries meaning, Martian Mono carries evidence. Mono never sets prose; Archivo never sets output.

rules.name: The Flat Field Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest and flat on hover. State changes recolor (brass, background tint) — they never lift, scale, or cast.

dos: Do keep steel cobalt carrying real surface area — bands, panels, terminal figures (The Committed Surface Rule).
Do use real trellis output for every terminal figure, captured from an actual workspace (The Proof-in-Mono Rule).
Do draw all structure with 1px hairlines and tonal steps; state changes recolor, never lift (The Flat Field Rule).
Do hold WCAG AA everywhere: Chart Ink 16.3:1, Fog Gray 9.1:1, Ink Dark on brass 9.9:1 — verified numerically, re-verify when tokens move.
Do give docs pages landing-page-level craft; the docs are the pitch.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS landing page: no gradient heroes, no floating product screenshots, no pricing-page energy.
Don't ship a sterile default docs theme — an out-of-the-box Starlight/Docusaurus look with no identity.
Don't drift into Linear/Vercel dark-glow: glowing gradients, luminous blur, floating UI (The No-Glow Rule).
Don't put Fog Gray text on cobalt fills — it fails contrast at 3.4:1 (The Ink-on-Cobalt Rule).
Don't claim 'simple' or 'powerful' in the abstract; show the lattice before/after ledger and real config instead.

Don't add eyebrow labels, reflex-numbered section markers, identical card grids, side-stripe borders, or box-shadows. The one numbered sequence (the command lifecycle) is numbered because it IS a sequence.
